svg.title: Food delivery app — system architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing clients, API gateway, core microservices, message queue, and data stores for a food delivery app.

g.text: Customer app · Restaurant app · Driver app · Admin dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the API gateway handle in a food delivery app?')
sendPrompt('How should the order service be designed?')
sendPrompt('How should the restaurant service be designed?')
sendPrompt('How does driver dispatch and location tracking work?')
sendPrompt('How should payments be handled in a food delivery app?')
sendPrompt('What does the notification service send and how?')
sendPrompt('What does the user service manage?')
sendPrompt('What does the search and discovery service do?')
sendPrompt('Why use a message queue like Kafka in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('Which databases should a food delivery app use and why?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used in food delivery apps?')
sendPrompt('How is location data stored and queried in real time?')
sendPrompt('What goes in object storage for a food delivery app?')
